## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature or behavior change

## Validation

<!-- List commands run, manual checks performed, screenshots reviewed, or explain why validation is not needed. -->

- [ ] Backend tests: `cd backend && npm test`
- [ ] Frontend tests: `cd frontend && npm test`
- [ ] Documentation/config checks
- [ ] Not applicable; reason:

## Data, privacy, and security impact

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, connection strings, Terraform state, publish profiles, CSV exports, or personal data are included.
- [ ] I considered whether this change affects player names, emails, gameplay progress, admin emails, OTP metadata, exports, or logs.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes have been described clearly for maintainer review.

## Documentation

- [ ] README, deployment, support, or security docs were updated if needed.
- [ ] Not applicable; reason:

## Contributor checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues or discussed the change with maintainers.
- [ ] I agree to follow the Code of Conduct.
- [ ] I will complete any required Microsoft Contributor License Agreement steps.
- [ ] I reviewed any AI-assisted content and disclosed material AI assistance in this PR if applicable.
